summary: Backend-only testing for the iteration changes. Wrote pytest suite (19 tests, 100% pass) covering auth, system settings (max_orders_per_time_slot), HEIC/JPEG upload, production-sheet, time-slot capacity GET, approval-based delete (super-admin direct delete with reason, 400 without reason, manager-raised request + super-admin approve), customers import, kitchen deadline enrichment, time-slot cap 409 enforcement, and regression on outlets/zones/orders manage/kitchen/customers/factory endpoints.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - the canonical list endpoint is /api/orders/manage. Not a regression, just FYI; consider documenting or adding a /api/orders alias for consistency.

action_items: All 11 review-request items pass. No backend fixes required from main agent.
Optional: align /api/orders to /api/orders/manage or expose a thin alias for clients that expect plain /api/orders GET.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 5587 lines - should be split into modules (orders, outlets, kitchen, factory, customers, settings, uploads, auth) for maintainability.

POST /api/orders returns {'order_id': ...} instead of full Order or {'id': ...} - inconsistent with most other CRUD endpoints which return resource directly. Frontend/clients must remember the special key.
Pre-existing lint warnings (AISENSY undefined ~line 4824/4838, F841/F601) noted by main agent; not from this iteration.
Time-slot enforcement only fires when system_settings.max_orders_per_time_slot > 0; behaviour and 409 message verified correct.
HEIC upload path correctly uses pillow_heif (HEIC_SUPPORTED True) and saves as .jpg; tested via image/heic content-type and .heic filename branch.
delete_order: super_admin path sets delete_status='approved' and is_deleted=True; non-super-admin path only sets pending request without altering visibility - verified via /orders/delete-requests.
test_credentials: admin@usbakers.com / admin123 (super admin); manager@usbakers.com / manager123 (after running seed_data.py)
seed_data_creation: Ran /app/backend/seed_data.py to create 3 outlets, 9 zones, 4 staff users, 15 orders. Required for non-super-admin delete-flow test (manager_token).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_backend_changes.py covers all iteration endpoints. To re-run: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_iteration_backend_changes.py -v. Time-slot test uses random future date+time to avoid collisions on re-runs. seed_data.py must be run once for manager user to exist; super_admin test path works without it. test_credentials fixture skips manager tests gracefully if seed not run.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found in the iteration changes. Two minor test-script fixes were made: (1) POST /api/orders response uses 'order_id' key, not 'id'; (2) regression test now uses /api/orders/manage since plain /api/orders has no GET handler.
